sources.title: Secrets & Lies S1 E5 (Full Episode) Thriller, Mystery
sources.description:
Season 1, Episode 5
A man who finds the body of a young boy quickly becomes the prime murder suspect, putting his life and his family at risk. Secrets and Lies.

2014
Starring Martin Henderson, Anthony Hates, Diana Glenn, Adrienne Pickering, Philippa Coulthard, Piper Morissey

Edited for YouTube ad standards

metadata.Plot: Following the death of her adoptive parents, a successful young black optometrist establishes contact with her biological mother -- a lonely white factory worker living in poverty in East London.
metadata.Actors: Timothy Spall, Brenda Blethyn, Phyllis Logan
metadata.Awards: Nominated for 5 Oscars. 36 wins & 47 nominations total
